message:
refactor(bench): unify canonicalize benchmarks and update embedder API

- Remove legacy vs streaming canonicalization comparison benchmarks since
  canonicalize_for_embedding now implements the optimal strategy internally.
  The legacy and streaming variants were removed from the public API.
- Rename embed()/embed_batch() calls to embed_sync()/embed_batch_sync()
  to match the updated Embedder trait signatures.
- Consolidate bench_canonicalize_streaming_vs_legacy_sizes into
  bench_canonicalize_scaling with a single canonicalize path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
